title: Hammers+
description: This mod will add hammers (based off of Thor's Mjollnir) which can be crafted in survival.
body:
**Summary**

This mod will add hammers (based off of Thor's Mjollnir) which can be crafted in survival.  This mod is fun to mess around with, When you have the power of lightning
And explosions at your fingertips
I'm thinking the circle.

**Benefits**

If you ever feel bored of Minecraft and want a fun way to spice it up, why not blast into the sky and light mobs on fire!

**Features**

*Items:*

Hilt - Crafted with 2 sticks on the bottom left and top right of a crafting grid with an iron Ingot In the middle and used to make the "Hammer".

Hammer Head - Crafted with 1 netherite ingot in the centre surrounded by 4 diamonds on the edges and 4 smooth stone on the corners, used to make the "Hammer".

Hammer Core - Crafted with 1 Nether star in the centre surrounded by 4 Obsidian on the edges and 4 Netherite ingots on the corners, used to make the "Over Heated Hammer".

Hammer - Smithed with a Hammer Head and a Hilt in a Smithing table.  It has similar stats to a Netherite Pickaxe.

Over Heated Hammer - Smithed with a Hammer Core and a Hammer in a Smithing Table, You will via Tnt explode on right-click.

Enhanced Hammer - Smithed with an Over Heated Hammer and Packed Ice in a Smithing table, It will attack with 14 Damage and strike the mob with lightning. On Left-Click, you can launch into the sky

Ranged Hammer - Smithed with an Enhanced Hammer and a Bow in a Smithing table, It does 7 attack damage on melee and 12.5 on throw, when hitting an entity It will strike lightning, but if a block is hit, it will explode Tnt and strike lightning.
